---
name: Submit a policy
about: Propose a new policy file for inclusion
labels: contribution
---

**Policy file name**
What you want to name it and which folder.

**What it does**
One paragraph — what it enforces or blocks.

**Why it is needed**
The specific risk, misconfiguration, or
compliance requirement this addresses.

**Tested on**
AWS Organizations policy type and
the environment type you tested on
(non-production / sandbox).

**Draft policy JSON**
Paste your JSON here.

**Companion doc draft**
Paste your .md content here or link to a
Google Doc if it is long.
